segments.text: Here's how to create a YouTube channel
from [music] scratch.
First, head over to YouTube and sign in
with your Google account. If you don't
have one yet, you will need to create
that first. Once you're signed in, click
your profile picture in the top right
corner of the screen. From that menu,
click create a channel. If you do not
see it, you can also go into settings,
then create a new one from there.
YouTube will then ask what type of
channel you want. You can choose from a
personal channel or a brand account if
this is for a business or a different
name. Next, type in your channel name
and choose unique handle. This is the
username people will see when they tag
you. Once that's done, click create
channel. And that's it. Your YouTube
channel is officially live and ready for
uploads.
